environment_scale.question: What environment is this architecture for?
environment_scale.impact: Controls default SKU tiers, redundancy, and monitoring depth across all Azure resources

environment_scale.question: Expected data volume ingested per day?
environment_scale.impact: Sizes Azure Blob/ADLS storage tiers, Event Hubs throughput units, and Synapse DWU allocation

environment_scale.question: Expected number of concurrent users or connections?
environment_scale.impact: Determines VM Scale Set sizing, App Service plan tier, Functions scaling limits, and CDN capacity

compliance_security.question: Which compliance frameworks apply to this workload?
compliance_security.impact: Enables Azure Policy initiatives, activates Defender for Cloud regulatory dashboards, restricts allowed regions

compliance_security.question: Are there data residency requirements?
compliance_security.impact: Constrains Azure region selection and replication targets; adds geo-fencing policies in IaC

compliance_security.question: What level of network isolation is required?
compliance_security.impact: Adds Private Link, VNet injection, NSGs, and Azure Firewall to IaC; may change service SKUs

compliance_security.question: Encryption key management preference?
compliance_security.impact: Toggles CMK configuration on storage accounts, databases, and disks; adds Key Vault resources to IaC

architecture_preferences.question: Preferred tier / SKU strategy?
architecture_preferences.impact: Selects Basic/Standard/Premium SKUs across Azure services; affects estimated monthly cost

architecture_preferences.question: High-availability requirements?
architecture_preferences.impact: Adds availability zones, geo-replication, Traffic Manager / Front Door profiles

architecture_preferences.question: Disaster-recovery RTO target?
architecture_preferences.impact: Determines replication mode, standby resources, and Azure Site Recovery configuration

architecture_preferences.question: Preferred Infrastructure-as-Code format for the output?
architecture_preferences.impact: Sets the IaC language used in generated templates

architecture_preferences.question: Target Azure deployment region?
architecture_preferences.impact: Determines the Azure region for deployment and cost estimation; affects pricing, latency, and compliance

data_processing.question: Preferred Azure storage redundancy level?
data_processing.impact: Sets replication type on all Azure Storage Accounts and ADLS Gen2 resources

data_processing.question: Preferred managed Spark runtime on Azure?
data_processing.impact: Replaces default EMR → HDInsight/Synapse mapping; regenerates IaC with chosen runtime

data_processing.question: Azure Functions hosting plan preference?
data_processing.impact: Sets Azure Functions plan type; Premium required for VNet integration and >10 min execution

data_processing.question: Cosmos DB throughput model?
data_processing.impact: Configures Cosmos DB capacity mode; affects cost model and performance guarantees

data_processing.question: Preferred Cosmos DB API?
data_processing.impact: Selects the Cosmos DB API and SDK; Gremlin for graph workloads, NoSQL for key-value

data_processing.question: Azure Cache for Redis tier?
data_processing.impact: Sets Redis cache SKU; Enterprise required for RediSearch, RedisJSON

data_processing.question: Azure SQL / PostgreSQL tier preference?
data_processing.impact: Determines Azure SQL DB or Flexible Server compute tier and max IOPS

data_processing.question: Preferred real-time streaming engine on Azure?
options: Azure Event Hubs + Spark Structured Streaming
data_processing.impact: Selects streaming analytics approach; Kafka surface allows existing Kafka client reuse

iot.question: Expected IoT message volume?
iot.impact: Sizes IoT Hub tier (S1/S2/S3) and partition count; affects Event Hubs downstream capacity

iot.question: Is edge computing required?
iot.impact: Adds Azure IoT Edge module definitions and edge deployment manifests to IaC

iot.question: Device management scope — how many devices?
iot.impact: Selects IoT Hub unit count and DPS (Device Provisioning Service) allocation

iot.question: Do you need a digital-twin model of physical assets?
iot.impact: Adds Azure Digital Twins resource and DTDL model scaffolding to IaC

monitoring_operations.question: Desired monitoring and observability depth?
options: Full observability (Azure Monitor + Grafana + Log Analytics)
monitoring_operations.impact: Adds Log Analytics workspace, Application Insights, Managed Grafana, or Sentinel to IaC (or nothing if None)

monitoring_operations.question: Preferred CI/CD platform?
monitoring_operations.impact: Generates starter CI/CD pipeline definition alongside IaC templates

monitoring_operations.question: Alerting and notification channel?
monitoring_operations.impact: Configures Azure Monitor action groups and alert rules in IaC (or nothing if None)

containers.question: AKS cluster tier?
containers.impact: Sets AKS SKU tier, uptime SLA, and enables/disables Cluster Autoscaler

containers.question: AKS default node pool VM size?
containers.impact: Sets default node pool VM size; GPU nodes required for ML inference workloads

containers.question: Preferred container hosting model on Azure?
containers.impact: Overrides default ECS/Fargate/App Runner mapping to chosen Azure container service

ai_ml.question: Azure Machine Learning workspace edition?
ai_ml.impact: Sets AML workspace SKU; Enterprise required for managed online endpoints

ai_ml.question: Primary ML compute target?
ai_ml.impact: Provisions appropriate compute cluster type in Azure ML workspace

hybrid_multicloud.question: What is your hybrid / multi-cloud strategy?
options: Multi-cloud — run workloads across Azure + another cloud
Edge + cloud — processing at the edge with cloud control plane
hybrid_multicloud.impact: Adds Azure Arc, Azure Stack HCI, or Lighthouse resources to IaC depending on chosen strategy

hybrid_multicloud.question: Which resources need Azure Arc management?
hybrid_multicloud.impact: Determines which Arc-enabled services to provision — Arc K8s, Arc SQL, or Arc Servers

generative_ai.question: Preferred foundation model provider on Azure?
generative_ai.impact: Selects the model deployment target — Azure OpenAI or AI Foundry model catalog

generative_ai.question: Do you need autonomous AI agents with tool use?
options: Yes — Azure AI Agent Service (hosted agents)
generative_ai.impact: Adds Azure AI Agent Service or custom agent framework resources to the architecture

generative_ai.question: Content safety requirements for AI outputs?
options: Custom Azure AI Content Safety policies
No content filtering needed (internal use only)
generative_ai.impact: Configures Azure AI Content Safety resources and custom filter policies

edge_computing.question: What is the primary edge computing use case?
options: Ultra-low-latency at 5G / telco edge (Azure Edge Zones)
CDN edge functions (Front Door Rules Engine)
edge_computing.impact: Selects the appropriate Azure edge compute target and adds related IaC resources

data_governance.question: Do you need a centralized data catalog and governance?
options: No — data governance not needed now
data_governance.impact: Adds Microsoft Purview resources for data catalog, lineage, and governance
data_governance.default: No — data governance not needed now

data_governance.question: Do you need privacy-preserving data collaboration (clean rooms)?
data_governance.impact: Adds Azure Confidential Clean Rooms with confidential computing guarantees

zero_trust.question: How should users access internal applications?
options: Zero Trust Network Access (Microsoft Entra Private Access)
zero_trust.impact: Replaces VPN with Entra Private Access for zero-trust identity-based access to apps

zero_trust.question: Preferred SIEM / security analytics solution?
zero_trust.impact: Provisions Microsoft Sentinel workspace with data connectors and analytics rules

zero_trust.question: Azure Firewall tier?
options: Premium (adds IDPS, TLS inspection, URL filtering)
zero_trust.impact: Selects Azure Firewall SKU; Premium required for intrusion detection and TLS inspection
